get.description: Get pipelines for a given layout

200.description: Get pipelines for a given layout

post.description: Create a new pipeline for a given layout

PipelineGetResponse.description: Root response object containing an array of pipeline configurations from Zoho CRM.

items.description: Picklist option representing a pipeline configuration with associated stage mappings.

display_value.description: Display name of the picklist value as shown to users.

default.description: Indicates if this is the default picklist value.

maps.description: Array of stage mappings for this picklist value.

items.description: Mapping between a picklist value and a specific pipeline stage, including its position and forecasting details.

display_value.description: User-facing display name of the pipeline stage.

sequence_number.description: Position of this stage in the pipeline sequence (1-based indexing).

colour_code.description: Hexadecimal color code associated with the stage for UI representation.

forecast_category.description: Represents a forecast category used in sales pipeline stages for revenue forecasting and reporting.

name.description: Human-readable name of the forecast category (e.g., 'Pipeline', 'Closed', 'Omitted').

id.description: Unique system identifier for the forecast category.

actual_value.description: Internal system value/API name for the stage.

id.description: Unique identifier for this stage mapping.

forecast_type.description: Forecast type indicating stage status (e.g., 'Open', 'Closed Won', 'Closed Lost').

actual_value.description: Internal API value for the picklist option.

id.description: Unique identifier for this picklist value.

PipelineCreateRequest.description: Request body for updating or creating pipeline configurations with custom picklist values and stage mappings.

pipeline.description: Array of pipeline picklist configurations to create or update.

items.description: Picklist value configuration for pipeline customization, including stage mappings.

display_value.description: User-facing display name for the picklist value.

default.description: Indicates if this picklist value should be set as the default option.

maps.description: Array of stage mappings defining which stages this picklist value connects to and their sequence.

items.description: Mapping configuration for associating a picklist value with a specific pipeline stage.

id.description: Unique identifier of the target pipeline stage to map.

display_value.description: User-facing display name for the pipeline stage.

sequence_number.description: Optional position of this stage mapping in the pipeline sequence (overrides default positioning).

code.description: Machine-readable error code indicating the type of error (e.g., 'INVALID_DATA', 'RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND').

details.description: Additional context about the specific error, typically identifying the problematic parameter.

resource_path_index.description: Unique identifier of the pipeline that caused the validation error.

message.description: Human-readable explanation of the error suitable for display to end users.

MaximumLengthErrorResponse.description: Error response when maximum length constraint is violated.

code.description: Machine-readable error code indicating the type of error.

details.description: Additional context about the specific error.

maximum_length.description: The maximum allowed length for the field.

api_name.description: API field name that caused the error.

json_path.description: JSON path pointing to the exact location of the error in the request.

message.description: Human-readable explanation of the error suitable for display to end users.

NoPermissionErrorResponse.description: No permission for create/update/delete pipeline error response

code.description: Machine-readable error code indicating the type of error (e.g., 'NO_PERMISSION').

details.description: Additional context about the specific error.

permissions.description: The required permission that is missing.

message.description: Human-readable explanation of the error suitable for display to end users.

PipelineGetErrorResponse.description: Standard error response format used across API endpoints for validation and business logic errors.

code.description: Machine-readable error code indicating the type of error (e.g., 'INVALID_DATA', 'RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND').

details.description: Additional context about the specific error, typically identifying the problematic parameter.

param_name.description: Name of the parameter that caused the validation error.

message.description: Human-readable explanation of the error suitable for display to end users.

PipelineCreateErrorResponse.description: Batch error response for pipeline operations maintaining 1:1 correspondence with request items when validation fails.

pipeline.description: Array of individual error responses matching the request pipeline items.

code.description: Machine-readable error code indicating the specific validation failure.

details.description: Error-specific context including field name and JSON path location.

api_name.description: API field name that caused the error.

json_path.description: JSON path pointing to the exact location of the error in the request.

message.description: Human-readable explanation of the specific error.

status.description: Overall status indicator for this item.

PipelineSuccessResponse.description: Batch success response for pipeline creation/update operations, maintaining 1:1 correspondence with request items.

pipeline.description: Array of individual success responses matching the request pipeline items.

items.description: Individual success response for a pipeline operation, mirroring the request structure.

id.description: Unique identifier of the newly created pipeline configuration.

details.description: Operation-specific success details including resource identifiers.

message.description: Human-readable confirmation of the successful operation.

PipelineTransferResponse.description: Response confirming pipeline transfer operation with source-to-target mappings for pipeline and stages.

transfer_pipeline.description: Array of pipeline transfer mappings showing source and target configurations.

pipeline.description: Pipeline-level transfer mapping from source to target pipeline.

stages.description: Array of stage mappings showing which stages transferred to which target stages.

PipelineTransferSuccessResponse.description: Success response for pipeline transfer scheduling operation with job tracking information.

transfer_pipeline.description: Array of pipeline transfer scheduling results maintaining 1:1 correspondence with request.

details.description: Success details including the scheduled job identifier.

job_id.description: Unique identifier of the scheduled pipeline transfer job for tracking.

message.description: Human-readable confirmation of the pipeline transfer scheduling.

PipelineTransferErrorResponse.description: Batch error response for pipeline transfer operations with detailed validation failure information.

transfer_pipeline.description: Array of individual pipeline transfer error responses matching request items.

code.description: Machine-readable error code for the validation failure.

details.description: Error context identifying the problematic field and its location.

api_name.description: API field name that failed validation.

value.description: The invalid value that caused the error.

exists_in.description: Indicates where the value already exists.

json_path.description: JSON path where the value already exists.
JSON path to the exact location of the validation error.

scopes.ZohoCRM.settings.pipeline.ALL: Full access to pipeline settings in Zoho CRM
scopes.ZohoCRM.settings.pipeline.READ: Read-only access to pipeline settings in Zoho CRM
scopes.ZohoCRM.settings.pipeline.CREATE: Create and modify pipeline settings in Zoho CRM
scopes.ZohoCRM.settings.pipeline.UPDATE: Update pipeline settings in Zoho CRM
